Mtn For Order 1) Deeming Pl'S Requests For Admissions Admitted, 2) Compelling Responses To Pl'S Form Interrogatories, & 3) Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Df & Her Attorneys Of Record
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Ali Abtahi, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Katherine Houston

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Katherine Houston's motion for an order deeming certain matters admitted is denied. The motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is moot. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of the responses served after the filing of the motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $650 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
